Price for Multi Use License. Typically ~4x Single Use price
Price for Extended Use License. Typically ~25x Single Use price

Describe your theme using Markdown and then preview it!
Is this only being sold on this website? Remember, exclusives get better commissions!
Provide the URL to the live preview of your theme. The preview must be the current version of your uploaded theme. Your preview cannor remove our preview frame, contain advertisements or referral links. We also discourage source obfuscation as it will adversely affect your sales.
730 x 548 pixel JPG/PNG screenshot no larger than 500mb. Please use a clean screenshot – no additional marketing text or imagery is allowed.
Upload cover
Swap cover
Maximum file size is 500MB. If you’re not sure what the requirements of our themes are, check out our Theme requirements page before submitting.
Upload .zip No file selected
Write a quick message explaining to our review team what you’ve updated. Being thorough and specific in this message will minimize review times.

By clicking “Submit update for review”, you are submitting your theme to Bootstrap Job’s review process. You agree that you’ve read and are compliant with our Theme Guidelines and that all code and assets not of your own creation have been appropriately licensed. Theme review of updates typically takes ~2 business days.

New themes or big discounts. Never spam.
